title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers: chat, generate, embeddings, model management.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration: use Ollama models as LLM, chat, or embeddings inside LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama: chat UI, model management, multi-user, dark/light themes, mobile friendly.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama: sync/async, streaming, fluent DSL, Android compatible.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem: chat, generate, pull, list, delete models with idiomatic Ruby.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps Ollama REST API with comfy TUI and shell completions.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot chat sidebar.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & PVC support.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama: reproducible builds, CUDA/rocm variants, module for NixOS.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration: OllamaGenerator & OllamaChatGenerator for RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG starter: ingest PDFs → Chroma → Ollama embeddings → chat with local Llama 3.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama service + model cache for CI pipelines.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot auto-configuration: inject Ollama client, chat templates, actuator metrics.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C# / .NET SDK: chat, generate, embeddings, model management with async enumerable streams.

title: ollama-operator
summary: Kubernetes operator that manages Ollama instances and models declaratively via CRDs.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library: small, idiomatic, generates from OpenAPI spec, supports streaming.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate: async client using reqwest, strongly typed requests & responses.
